cleaning_steps.description: Skipped 10 header rows from Excel file (title, subtitle, blank lines) and manually assigned column names.
cleaning_steps.impact: Enabled correct parsing of 1,122 municipality records.

cleaning_steps.description: Zero-padded municipality codes to 5 digits (e.g., 5001 → 05001) and department codes to 2 digits using str.zfill().
cleaning_steps.impact: Ensured consistent join keys across all datasets.

cleaning_steps.description: Applied ffill() to propagate department names down merged Excel cells.
cleaning_steps.impact: All 1122 municipalities now have a department name.

cleaning_steps.description: Dropped rows where latitude or longitude was null or non-numeric.
cleaning_steps.impact: Removed invalid geographic entries, retaining only plottable municipalities.

cleaning_steps.description: Loaded CSV with low_memory=False to prevent mixed-type inference on 686K+ rows.
cleaning_steps.impact: Correct data types for all columns from initial load.

null_handling.reason: Municipalities without gastronomy establishments should score 0, not be excluded.
Same logic — absence of data means absence of providers.
Prevents errors when iterating subcategory lists in the frontend.

transformations.name: Gastronomy Filtering (Regex)
transformations.reason: Isolate gastronomy-related providers. Negative lookahead (?!RAN) prevents false matches with "BARRANQUILLA".

transformations.name: Log Transformation — log(1+x)
transformations.reason: These features have extremely right-skewed distributions (Bogotá: 3,854 establishments vs median: 5). Log compresses the range so outliers do not dominate normalization.

transformations.name: Min-Max Normalization
transformations.reason: Scales all features to [0, 1] for comparable weighted combination regardless of original units.

transformations.name: Climate Feature Engineering
transformations.reason: Created a composite climate comfort index from estimated temperature and precipitation using domain knowledge of Colombia thermal floors.

feature_engineering.description: Number of gastronomy establishments per municipality
Diversity of gastronomy subcategories (restaurant, gastrobar, café, etc.)
Total employees in gastronomy sector per municipality
Total tourism providers — measures overall tourism infrastructure
Climate comfort score (0-1) based on estimated temperature and precipitation
